speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Subah se bas roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai aur lag raha hai ki sab khatam ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the emotional overwhelm and numbness without rushing to the problem.
text: Tumhara dimaag ekdum sunn lag raha hai, aur aisi feeling aa rahi hai jaise kuch bacha hi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Haan, aur mujhe lagta hai mujhe itna overreact nahi karna chahiye. Shayad main hi weak hoon jo handle nahi kar pa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handling stigma cue by mirroring the self-blame with a soft pause.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai ki yeh tumhari weakness hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Kal raat Papa se bahut zyada behas hui. Ek aur rishta mana ho gaya, aur wo keh rahe hain ki meri kundali mein hi dosh hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational aspect and the weight of the father's words.
text: Papa ne kundali aur dosh ki baat ki, aur us behas ke baad se yeh sab bahut bhaari lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, samajh nahi aa raha ki ab kal college kaise jaungi ya unka samna kaise karungi. Itna bura lag raha hai ki main kabhi kisi ke layak nahi ban paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the feared consequence of not being worthy after two restatements.
text: Samna karne ke khayal se hi darr lag raha hai, yeh kisi ke layak na ban paane wali baat sabse zyada kahan chubh rahi hai tumhe?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Mere friends apne career ki baatein karte hain, aur mere ghar pe roj yahi stress hai. Papa naraz rehte hain aur main unhe disappoint nahi karna chahti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational conflict between friends' lives and home pressure.
text: Ek taraf doston ka aage badhna aur doosri taraf ghar pe unhe disappoint na karne ka pressure, dono ek saath handle karna mushkil ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai main chahe kitni bhi padhai kar loon, unke liye meri shaadi hi meri aukaat hai. Isiliye subah se rona aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting deeper reflection on this realization of worth tied to marriage.
text: Jab tumhe lagta hai ki padhai ke baad bhi aukaat sirf shaadi se naapi ja rahi hai, toh us waqt andar kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Us waqt bilkul akela mehsoos hota hai. Lagta hai jaise kisi ko meri fikar hi nahi hai, bas apne samaj ke izzat ki fikar hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the core emotion of quiet resignation and isolation due to the rishta pressure.
text: Lagta hai jaise itne apno ke beech bhi tum bilkul akele pad gayi ho, ek aisi khamoshi aa gayi hai jahan tumhari apni pehchaan chhup gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Mujhe college complete karna hai, par unka taana ki 'kuch nahi ho payega' dimag mein ghoomta rehta hai. Dimaag ekdum sunn ho jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the feeling as culturally normal without fixing it.
text: Bilkul normal hai aisa feel karna. Humare yahan aksar ladkiyon ki poori mehnat ko ek rishte ke rejection se judge kar liya jata hai, par iska matlab yeh nahi ki tum kamzor ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin jab aapke apne hi Papa aise kahen toh kahan jaye insaan? Mujhe unse baat karne se bhi darr lag raha hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote to reduce stigma and normalize the conflict.
text: Students mein yeh shaadi ka aur parental expectations ka pressure bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki ghar ki baat samjhi jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein, kabhi kabhi toh mann karta hai college jana chhod doon. Itni anjaan jagah lagti hai ab apni hi life.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing mild risk with normalising, then restating.
text: Jab itna bojh ho toh aise khayal aana bohot swabhavik hai. Itne time se jo ladki college ke sapne dekh rahi thi, aaj usko apni hi life anjaan lagne lagi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe ho. Mujhe samajh aa raha hai ki yeh unka stress hai, meri galti nahi. Par abhi ke liye main kya karoon? Dimaag abhi bhi bhari hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable steps fitting the persona.
text: Kuch chote steps soch sakte hain. Ek toh, aaj college ka bag raat mein hi laga ke rakh do taaki subah sochna na pade. Ya phir apne kisi close friend se kal sirf notes maang lena, baat karne ka mann na ho toh.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bag lagane ka idea theek hai. Kam se kam subah ek decision toh kam lena padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen suggestion step-by-step.
text: Pehle aaj apna college ka bag pack kar lo. Phir thoda paani piyo aur let jao. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye, kal ka kal dekhenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda theek lag raha hai abhi ye soch kar. Par Papa ka kya karoon jab wo kal subah phir se wahi dosh wali baat uthayenge?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe on the stressor.
text: Aise halaat mein parents khud samaj aur biradari ke pressure mein hote hain, isliye wo apni anxiety tum par dosh aur kundali ke naam pe nikalte hain. Yeh unka darr hai, tumhari kami nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unka darr hai, yeh sunkar mujhe thodi himmat mil rahi hai. Main shayad unki baton ko ignore karne ki koshish kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the newfound resolve.
text: Toh tum tayyar ho unke us darr ko apna banaye bina, sirf apni college wali routine par dhyaan dene ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koshish karungi. Aaj poora din rote rote gaya, main aage bhi aise hi waste nahi karna chahti apni studies.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her focus on her studies despite the environment.
text: Tumhari padhai ke liye yeh lagan bahut genuine hai. Aise mahol mein bhi focus dhundna, asaan kaam nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne time nikala meri baat sunne ke liye, thank you. Main soch rahi thi ki koi nahi samjhega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the sense of feeling heard.
text: Jo baat anjaan rehne ka darr tha, aaj usko kisi ne suna toh tum thoda aasaan mehsoos kar rahi हो.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn hai
text: Haan, ab wo dimaag sunn wali feeling thodi kam ho gayi hai. Pata nahi kal kaisa jayega, par abhi better hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking what small thing will help maintain this state tonight.
text: Abhi ka yeh sukoon barkarar rakhne ke liye, abhi aisi kaun si choti cheez karogi jisse aur relief mile?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad main apne earphones laga kar bas koi halka music sunungi thodi der. Phir so jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her self-soothing strategy.
text: Yeh music sunne wala raasta bahut accha hai, apne aap ko is shor se thoda alag karne ka ek safe tareeka.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, mujhe sacch mein abhi so jana chahiye taaki kal subah uthne mein aalas na aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her readiness for tomorrow.
text: Tum ab aage badhne aur kal ki subah ka samna fresh hoke karne ke liye ready ho gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Main manage kar lungi kal. Aur zaroorat padi toh phir se aapse aakar baat karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing warmly.
text: Zaroor, jab bhi baat karne ka mann ho ya bojh lage, hum yahan hain. Take care of yourself aur aaram se so jao.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Mera dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai. Raat se ajeeb si ghabrahat ho rahi hai aur saans lene mein bhi dikkat ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the emotional overwhelm and feeling quality without rushing to the problem.
text: Tumhe itni ghabrahat ho rahi hai ki andar ekdum khali pan lag raha hai, aur saans lena bhi bhaari mehsoos ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Haan... actually Mummy ne raat ko kuch bola tha. But chhodhiye, shayad main hi faltu mein overreact kar rahi hoon aur panic kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handling stigma cue by mirroring the self-invalidation with a soft pause.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai ki tum apni is ghabrahat ko faltu mein bada bana rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi, baat badi hai. Mummy keh rahi thi ki teen baar rishta laut gaya hai, ab log kya kahenge. Wo meri bahar nikalne par pabandi lagayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational conflict and the threat of restricted mobility.
text: Mummy ki baaton se yeh sunna ki 'log kya kahenge' aur is wajah se bahar jaana band ho sakta hai, yeh sach mein bohot darrane wala khayal hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Bahut darr lag raha hai. Main unhe kaise samjhaun ki meri padhai mere liye kitni zaroori hai? Ye soch ke hi dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the feared consequence around her education being stopped.
text: Jab Mummy aisi pabandi ki baat karti hain, toh tumhari is padhai ke chhutne ka sabse bada darr kya hota hai us waqt?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse bada darr yeh hai ki main zindagi bhar kisi aur pe dependent reh jaungi. Ghar ki chaar deewari mein bas jaungi, meri koi pehchaan nahi hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the unexpressed feeling of quiet resignation and trapped helplessness.
text: Lagta hai jaise ek ghutan si mehsoos ho rahi hai, jahan apne sapne aur azaadi khatam hoti hui dikh rahi hain, aur ek deep quiet resignation baith gayi hai andar.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Exactly. Main kuch kar bhi nahi sakti kyunki rishte lautne mein meri koi galti nahi thi. Par saari restrictions mujh par lag rahi hain. Dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai sochte sochte.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the unfairness and duration of this burden.
text: Bina tumhari galti ke jab yeh saara bojh itne time se akele tumhare kandho par daal diya gaya hai, toh sochna band ho jana bohot natural hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mummy samajhti nahi hain. Unhe lagta hai padhai chhod ke ghar ke kaam seekhne se sab theek ho jayega. Mujhe ghutan hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the feeling as culturally normal without fixing it.
text: Bilkul samajh sakta hoon ki ghutan kyun ho rahi hai. Humari society mein rishta rejection ka sara blame ladkiyon ki lifestyle aur mobility par daal dena bahut aam hai, par iska matlab yeh nahi ki tumhare sapne galat hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, but log kya kahenge is baat ne meri poori peace of mind khatam kar di hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab kuch chhod doon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing mild risk and sharing a systemic anecdote to reduce isolation.
text: Jab society ka shor itna ho toh thak jaana bohot normal hai. College jane wali ladkiyon mein yeh 'log kya kahenge' ka pressure aur achanak pabandi lagna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki izzat ka sawaal bana dete hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Izzat ka sawaal. Par main kya karoon? Mujhe toh apne assignment submit karne hain, aur yahan dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the conflict between immediate academic duties and the emotional block.
text: Ek taraf padhai aur assignments ki responsibility hai, aur doosri taraf ghar ke is tension ne tumhare dimaag ko sunn kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe ab aage theek hona hai, is loop se nikalna hai. Abhi ke liye ab kya karoon samajh nahi aa raha taaki kam se kam padhai kar sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering manageable, quick steps to ground the Seeker.
text: Jab dimaag thoda shant karna ho, toh do choti cheezein kar sakte hain. Ya toh sirf 5 minute ke liye deep breathing karke apna ek assignment file nikal lo, ya phir kisi trusted friend ko sirf ek message drop kar do ki kal college milte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing wala try karti hoon, friend ko message kar diya hai maine already. Par Mummy kal subah phir wahi baat shuru karengi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe about the mother's anxiety.
text: Aksar parents apne biradari ke darr ko bacchon par pabandi lagakar control karne ki koshish karte hain. Yeh unki social anxiety hoti hai, tumhara fail hona nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unki social anxiety... yeh baat maine aise kabhi sochi nahi thi. Shayad wo bhi darr rahi hain society ke taano se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her shift in perspective.
text: Toh abhi ke liye tum is darr ko unki pareshani ki tarah dekh paa rahi ho, na ki tumhari galti ki tarah.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Haan, thoda sa. Main kal subah unse bahas nahi karungi, bas apna assignment le kar college jaungi. Abhi bhi dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai, par thodi himmat aa rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the breathing and focusing on the immediate next step.
text: Chalo phir sabse pehle aaj thoda paani piyo. Apna assignment bag mein rakho, aur sirf abhi ki saans par dhyan do... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bag laga liya hai maine. Yeh step-by-step karne se sach mein thoda theek lag raha hai. Mujhe kal ke baare mein soch ke ghabrahat ho rahi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her proactive effort to ground herself.
text: Tumhari padhai ke liye yeh chhoti koshish bahut badi baat hai. Jab poora ghar society ke pressure mein uljha ho, tab apna dhyaan rakhan himmat ka kaam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapka bahut shukriya mujhe sunne ke liye. Main kal try karungi ki apne doston ke saath thoda normal feel karun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her feeling of being heard and having a plan.
text: Yeh sun kar mujhe bhi tasalli hui ki tum apne doston ki sangat mein us ghutan se thoda door hona chahti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kal bas chup chap ghar se niklungi. Agar fir Mummy ne kuch poocha toh main keh dungi mere practicals hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Clarifying her readiness to face tomorrow morning.
text: Kal jab subah uthogi toh yahi ek chhote se plan ko follow karne ke liye tum ready feel kar rahi ho abhi?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Haan, main ready hoon. Ab wo dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai wali feeling itni overwhelming nahi lag rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her progress.
text: Yeh ek bohot safe aur samjhdaari wala rasta hai apne aap ko kal ke us tanaav se bachane ka.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas ab chain ki neend sona chahti hoon taaki kal energy rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her closing needs.
text: Itne lambe din ke baad, aaram ki neend lena abhi sabse zyada zaroori lag raha hai tumhare liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Pata nahi tha thodi baat karne se itna asar padega. Thank you.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her vulnerability in reaching out.
text: Aise bhari mahol mein apni pareshani baantna aasan nahi hota, yeh tumhari ek nayi strength hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Good night, ab main phone rakhti hoon aur sone ki koshish karti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closing with warmth.
text: Hamesha yaad rakhna ki hum yahan hain jab bhi aisi ghutan feel ho. Aaram se so jao, take care.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Flood of emotions itna zyada hai
text: Flood of emotions itna zyada hai ki main bas ek kone mein baithi hoon aur lag raha hai andar hi andar toot rahi hoon. Na padhai mein focus hai aur na kisi se baat karne ka mann kar raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the emotional overwhelm without asking for the cause yet.
text: Tumhare andar ek poora toofan chal raha hai, jahan sab kuch ekdum overwhelming lag raha hai aur bas chupchap akele rehne ka mann ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Flood of emotions itna zyada hai
text: Haan... I mean, mujhe itna overreact nahi karna chahiye. Baki ladkiyan bhi toh manage karti hain, shayad main hi weak hoon jo itna ro rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing the stigma cue with a soft reflection of her self-blame.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai ki is tarah se tootna tumhari kamzori dikha raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Flood of emotions itna zyada hai
text: Nahi, baat kuch aur hai. Kal raat ghar mein bahut buri ladaai hui. Papa bahut gusse mein the, aur unhone kuch aisi baatein bol di jo bahut deeply chubh gayi hain. Flood of emotions itna zyada hai ki dimag process hi nahi kar pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational conflict and the weight of the father's words.
text: Jab Papa jaise apne insaan se itni chubhne wali baatein sunne ko milti hain, toh usko process kar paana sach mein namumkin sa lagne lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unhone bola ki meri wajah se khandaan ki izzat mitti mein mil rahi hai. Kyunki har rishta jo aata hai, wo mujhe reject karke chala jata hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aata isme meri kya galti hai.

strategy_intent: Probing gently into the feeling of being blamed for the rejections.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe aisa laga jaise zameen phat jaye aur main usme sama jaun. Itni zyada sharam aa rahi thi khud par, jaise meri padhai aur meri mehnat ki unke aage koi value hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the conflict between her hard work and their devaluation.
text: Ek taraf tumhari din raat ki mehnat aur padhai hai, aur doosri taraf gharwalon ke is rejection wale taane ne us sabki ahmiyat ko zero kar diya hai.

text: Exactly. Mere sapne the ki main pehle apna career set karungi. But ab sab khatam lag raha hai. I feel like a burden. Flood of emotions itna zyada hai ki I can't even cry properly anymore.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the core unexpressed emotion of quiet resignation stemming from rishta pressure.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise ab tumne bhi andar hi andar haar maan li hai, ek aisi quiet resignation aa gayi hai jahan apne sapnon ke liye awaz uthana bhi bekar lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. I literally have no energy left to fight back. Par ye sab andar hi andar mujhe itna guilt aur shame feel karata hai, jaise sach mein main hi sabse badi problem hoon inki life mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings while separating her self-worth from the family's traditional expectations.
text: Ye shame aur guilt mehsoos hona bohot normal hai is situation mein. Humare yahan khandaan ki izzat aksar ladkiyon ki shaadi se jod di jati hai, par iska matlab ye bilkul nahi ki unke rishta thukrane se tumhari asoolan koi value kam ho gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Flood of emotions itna zyada hai
text: Main samajhti hoon ye baat logic se, par practical life mein face karna bohot alag hai. Mujhe kisi ko bhi muh dikhane mein sharam aa rahi hai ab. Shayad I should just hide forever.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her feeling of wanting to hide due to the shame.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai ki duniya se chup jaana hi ab ekmatra raasta bacha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, college bhi jane ka mann nahi karta. Wahan bhi relatives ke bacche hain jo dekhte hi notice karte hain. Meri identity bas ek failed rishte wali ladki banke reh gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a systemic anecdote to normalise her experience and show she isn't alone.
text: College jane wali ladkiyon mein yeh khandaan ki nazar aur rejection ka bojh bohot common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi aasani se is baare mein bolega nahi kyunki samaj society ko naraz nahi karna chahta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye sunkar thoda better lag raha hai ki main akeli nahi hoon. Par ab kya karoon? Mujhe wapas apni life aur padhai ka control chahiye, but I don't know where to start.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, low-effort actionable steps to regain a sense of control.
text: Control wapas paane ke liye, hum ek bohot chota kadam le sakte hain abhi. Ek option hai ki sirf apni study table pe jake apna ek fav subject ka book nikal lo, ya phir apne chehre par thanda paani daal kar wapas aaram se baith jao bina kisi pressure ke.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Flood of emotions itna zyada hai
text: Main paani wala try karti hoon. Rote rote aankhein waise bhi bohot jal rahi hain meri.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking her through the execution of the chosen step.
text: Pehle washroom jao aur thande paani se chehra dho lo... phir ek glass paani piyo aur apni table par aakar aaram se baith jao... bas itna hi aaj ke liye karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine face dho liya hai aur table par aa gayi hoon. Thank you, thoda physical relief toh mila. Par mujhe samajh nahi aata Papa mujhe itna kyun bolte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the father's behavior as a systemic issue rather than her personal failure.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her newfound understanding of the situation.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koshish toh kar rahi hoon isko wese hi dekhne ki. Agar main ye samjhungi ki ye unka fear hai, toh shayad mujhe utna chubhega nahi next time.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her emotional maturity in separating her worth from their fears.
text: Tumhara is naye nazariye se sochna bohot himmat ki baat hai. Apne parents ke darr ko unka samajhna aur khud ko us blame se azaad karna, ek strong step hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I hope so. Aaj thodi si notes ki reading maar lungi. Pura syllabus na sahi, par shuru toh kar hi sakti hoon kam se kam.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her small step towards studying.
text: Itne dino ki tension ke baad, abhi thodi si hi sahi, par shuruaat karne ka irada wapas aa raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Flood of emotions itna zyada hai
text: Haan. Jab aapse baat shuru ki thi tab wo flood of emotions bohot heavy feel ho raha tha, par ab lag raha hai manage kar lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting her to think of one supportive thing she can do for herself tonight.
text: Jab notes padhna khatam ho jaye, uske baad khud ko thoda aaram dene ke liye ek chhoti si cheez kya karogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad koi lofi music lagaungi air pods mein, taaki bahar ka shor sunai na de. Phir seedha so jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her self-soothing strategy.
text: Ye lofi music ka plan bilkul perfect lag raha hai, isse tumhe apne space mein peace feel karne ka mauka milega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, I just need a peaceful night. Thanks meri baat sunne ke liye, it really helped me ground myself.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her gratitude and feeling of being grounded.
text: Tumhari baaton se lag raha hai ki ab apne andar ek thehrao mehsoos ho raha hai, jo pehle wale darr aur confusion se kaafi behtar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul yahi feel ho raha hai. Main ab apni books nikaalti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing warmth and open door for future.
text: Hum hamesha yahan hain jab bhi aisi overwhelm wali feeling aaye aur baat karne ka mann ho. Apna khayal rakhna aur aaram se padhai karo.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas rona aa raha hai bina ruke
text: Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha kya ho raha hai mere saath. Ek ajeeb si feeling hai andar, bas rona aa raha hai bina ruke aur dimaag mein bas wahi kadwi baatein ghoom rahi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the emotional overwhelm and feeling quality.
text: Tumhare andar ek lamba rona ruka hua hai, aur wo kadwi baatein dimaag mein baar-baar ghoom ke itna heavy feel kara rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas rona aa raha hai bina ruke
text: Haan... kabhi kabhi lagta hai shayad mujh mein hi koi kami hai. Agar main theek hoti toh ye sab jhelna nahi padta mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handling stigma cue by mirroring the self-blame with a soft pause.
text: Tumhe lagne laga hai ki ye sab jo ho raha hai, uski wajah tumhari koi apni kami hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Mummy ne kal raat kaha ki caste mismatch ki wajah se ek aur achha ghar haath se nikal gaya. Aur ab unka kehna hai ki meri umar nikalti ja rahi hai. Ye sab sun ke main itni dukhi hoon ki samajh hi nahi aa raha is situation ko solve kaise karun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational pressure from the mother and the caste issue.
text: Mummy ki un baaton ne, ki caste ki wajah se rishta gaya aur umar beet rahi hai, tumhe puri tarah se phasa hua mehsoos kara diya hai jahan koi solution nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas rona aa raha hai bina ruke
text: Solution kuch hai hi nahi! Caste mera banaya hua thodi hai? Par taane mujhe mil rahe hain jaise main sabke liye ek bojh ban gayi hoon. Bas rona aa raha hai bina ruke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the feeling of being a burden due to things out of her control.
text: Jab koi aisi cheez, jis par tumhara control hi nahi hai jaise caste, uski wajah se tumhe ek bojh banaya ja raha hai, toh andar kaisa darr paida hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr ye lagta hai ki main kabhi kisi ko khush nahi rakh paungi. Meri padhai, mera kaam, sab kuch zero ho gaya hai sirf is baat ke aage ki meri shaadi nahi ho rahi. I feel completely worthless.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the core unexpressed emotion of quiet resignation stemming from rishta pressure.
text: Lagta hai jaise tumhari poori pehchaan sirf ek rishte pe aakar atka di gayi hai, aur ek quiet resignation aa gayi hai jahan apni baaki achhaiyan dikhayi dena hi band ho gayi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul yahi baat hai. Mujhe college jana, doston se milna ab fake lagta hai kyunki asliyat mein toh main bas ek unmarried ladki hoon jiska time nikalta ja raha hai. Yehi meri reality bana di gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duration and the loss of her external identity.
text: Itne time se wahi taane sunte sunte, tumhari college wali life aur dosti wali pehchaan tumse bohot door ho gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas rona aa raha hai bina ruke
text: Haan, main pehle itni confident hoti thi. Ab Mummy jab meri umar aur caste ki baat karti hain, toh mera andar se sab kuch khatam ho jata hai. Mujhe unki taraf dekhne mein sharam aati hai. Bas rona aa raha hai bina ruke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the stigma of feeling ashamed in front of her own mother.
text: Apni hi Mummy ki aankhon mein apne liye wo disappointment dekhna aur usse nazrein churana padna...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wo disappointment mujhe cheer ke rakh deti hai. Main ek padhi-likhi ladki hoon, fir bhi is 'umar nikal rahi hai' wale darr ne meri zindagi rula ke rakh di hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her worth against the cultural timeline pressure.
text: Ek padhi-likhi ladki ka is situation mein ghutna bohot dardnak hota hai. Humare society mein caste aur umar ka poora failure sirf ladki pe daal dena bohot aam hai, par in rejections ka tumhari value se koi lena-dena nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaash Mummy bhi ye baat samajh paati. Par wo relatives ke taanon se darrti hain. Aur main unhe khush nahi kar pa rahi isliye main problem lagti hoon khud ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote to normalize the burden and reduce isolation.
text: Khandaani setup mein relatives ka pressure aur ladki ki umar ka sawaal parents ki anxiety ko bohot bada deta hai — ye bohot saare gharon mein common hai, sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bahar walo se bolega nahi kyunki samaj society ko naraz nahi karna hota.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baatein sunkar thoda shant lag raha hai mujhe. Par mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... main aaj college ka kaam bhi kaise shuru karun in sab baaton ke baad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable actions to step out of the overwhelm.
text: Jab dimaag mein itni baatein chal rahi hon, toh aage badhne ke liye sirf agla ek chhota kadam sochna hota hai. Tum chaho toh abhi sirf apni study table ki lights on karke apni ek notebook nikal sakti ho, ya phir bas muuh dhokar ek cup paani pee sakti ho bina kisi kitab ke.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas rona aa raha hai bina ruke
text: Rona ab ruk gaya hai thoda. Main notebook nikalne ki koshish karti hoon, shayad dhyaan wahan lag jaye toh ye bojh wali feeling kam ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding the chosen small step.
text: Pehle apni chair pe aaram se baith jao... wo notebook bas saamne rakh lo. Ek lamba saans lo aur abhi padhne ka koi pressure mat dalo khud pe... bas itna hi aaj ke liye theek hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine notebook khol li hai. Abhi padhne ki energy toh nahi hai par kam se kam wo rone wala darr thoda side hua hai. Par Mummy jab raat mein khana khate time ye sab bolengi toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the mother's taunts as systemic anxiety, not personal attacks.
text: Jab Mummy raat ko ye baatein karti hain, toh darasal wo apna khud ka society wala darr tum par nikal rahi hoti hain. Unhe relatives ko jawaab dena hai, isliye wo apni anxiety tumhari kami bata kar shant karna chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unki apni anxiety... main is baat ko dhyan mein rakhungi. Isse kam se kam unki baatein mujhe andar tak aake nahi chubhengi. Unki ghabrahat meri asliyat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her empowered perspective shift.
text: Toh ab tum us darr aur taano ko Mummy ki ghabrahat ki tarah dekh kar, apni khud ki ahemiyat bachane ki jagah bana rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main koshish karungi. Kam se kam aaj raat ko main unn baaton ki wajah se phir se khud ko bojh feel nahi karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her emotional resilience.
text: Apne baare mein ye faisla karna bohot mature step hai. Aise tanaav wale mahol mein apni keemat ko parents ke taano se alag rakhna aasan kaam nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapka bahut shukriya mujhe sunne ke liye aur meri itni madad karne ke liye. Rote rote mujhe ummeed bilkul dikhni band ho gayi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her gratitude and shift from hopelessness.
text: Jahan poori tarah ummeed toot chuki thi wahan se baat karke tumne wapas apne liye ek raasta nikal liya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas rona aa raha hai bina ruke
text: Haan. Main bas yahi chah rahi thi ki koi ek baar mujhe sune aur samjhe ki mera dukh real hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting one last small step for her immediate comfort tonight.
text: Jab abhi apne ko itna shant aur samjha hua mehsoos kar rahi ho, toh sone se pehle khud ko sukoon dene ke liye kya ek chhoti si cheez karogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main apne best friend ko ek chhota sa text bhejungi, use sab kuch nahi bataungi bas kal college mein milne ka bolungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her connection with a safe space.
text: Apne dost ko ek simple text karke apne liye kal ka ek positive connection banana sach mein bohot reassuring step hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, uske saath rehti hoon toh dimaag mein izzat wali baatein utni nahi ghoomti. Thanks.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her anticipation of relief.
text: Kal dost se milne ki tayyari aur us sukoon ke khayal ne aaj ki raat ko aasan bana diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Main ab notebook band kar rahi hoon, bas thodi der letna chahti hoon pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her rest and closing gently.
text: Yeh letna aur aaram lena abhi sabse zyada zaroori hai, tumne bohot himmat dikhayi hai aaj ki shaam.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you so much. Good night, main ab rakhti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closing warmth.
text: Jab bhi dil kare wapas aakar baat karne ka, hum yahan hain. Sukoon ki neend lijiye, good night.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya
text: Mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai. Main bas sunn hokar leti hoon, na bhook lag rahi hai na pyaas... bas ek gehra dard mehsus ho raha hai aur lag raha hai ki sab khatam ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the emotional overwhelm and feeling quality without rushing to the problem.
text: Tumhare andar ek itna gehra dard aur khali pan hai, jisme sab kuch khatam hota hua mehsoos ho raha hai aur ekdum sunn pad gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya
text: Haan... aur mujhe lagta hai main bina wajah itna overreact kar rahi hoon. Baaki ladkiyan toh strong hoti hain, shayad mujh mein hi kami hai jo main handle nahi kar pa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handling stigma cue by mirroring the self-blame with a soft pause.
text: Tumhe lagne laga hai ki is tarah se tootna tumhari kamzori hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya
text: Nahi, raat ko Papa se bahut buri behas hui. Unhone kaha ki meri 'fitrat' ki wajah se log rishta thukra dete hain. Ye sun kar mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational conflict and the painful words from her father.
text: Jab Papa jaise apne insaan se aisi baat sunne ko mili ki tumhari 'fitrat' ki wajah se rishte toot rahe hain, toh usne poori tarah se block kar diya andar se.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot dard hua. Main is waqt kisi solution ke baare mein soch bhi nahi sakti. Kyunki jab apne hi aisi baatein bolein toh main kis se kya umeed rakhun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing gently into the implied fear stemming from the father's words.
text: Jab apno ki taraf se aisi chubhne wali baat aati hai, toh apne baare mein sabse zyada kya darr lagne lagta hai us pal mein?

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr ye lagta hai ki shayad wo sach keh rahe hain. Shayad main sach mein buri hoon, aur mera nature hi kharab hai. Yehi baatein baar baar dimaag mein aati hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her role as a daughter internalizing the disappointment.
text: Ek beti hone ke naate, jab Papa tumhare nature par hi sawal uthate hain, toh wo taana apne hi upar ek sach jaisa lagne lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya
text: Exactly. Unhone meri puri pehchan ko ek rejected rishte se jod diya. Main college mein itni mehnat karti hoon, par unke liye wo matter hi nahi karta. Mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai ye soch soch kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting deeper reflection on the pain of having her true identity erased.
text: Jab tumhari baaki saari mehnat aur achhaiyon ko zero karke sirf rejection ko hi tumhari pehchan bana diya jata hai, tab andar kya mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai ki meri koi value hi nahi hai. Jaise main unke liye sirf ek burden hoon jise unhe jaldi se jaldi kisi aur ko saumpna hai. I feel completely unwanted.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the core unexpressed emotion of quiet resignation stemming from rishta pressure.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise andar ek aisi chup si baith gayi hai, ek quiet resignation jahan tumhe khud bhi apni ahemiyat dikhai dena band ho gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul yahi. I literally have no energy left. Kabhi kabhi sochti hoon ki main kuch galat kar loon, par fir lagta hai unhe aur pareshan kyun karun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings while separating her self-worth from the family's traditional expectations.
text: Ye self-worth ka khatam hona aur aise khayal aana bohot normal hai is situation mein. Humare culture mein jab rishta reject hota hai, toh saari kami ladki ki fitrat mein nikal di jati hai, par in rejections ka tumhari value se koi lena-dena nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya
text: Main logical level pe samajhti hoon, but emotionally ye bohot painful hai. Mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai ab in sab discussions mein hissa lene ke baad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duration and exhaustion of dealing with this cycle.
text: Itne waqt se is painful cycle aur taano ko jhelte jhelte, ab emotionally aur sochna bilkul namumkin sa ho gaya hai tumhare liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi mein. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki society itni judgmental kyun hoti hai. Har koi sirf fail hone par judge karne baitha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a systemic anecdote to normalise her experience and show she isn't alone.
text: College jane wali young ladkiyon mein ye rishton ke rejection par family ka unki fitrat pe sawal uthana bohot common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bahar bolega nahi kyunki society izzat ka issue bana deti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe sach mein lagta tha main akeli hoon jo ye sab endure kar rahi hai. Par ab kya karoon? Mujhe aage toh badhna hai, aur theek hona chahti hoon is dukh se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, low-effort actionable steps to regain a sense of grounding.
text: Jab dimaag puri tarah se block ho jaye, toh chote steps lene hote hain. Tum abhi chaho toh thoda sa paani pee kar apni aakhon ko aaram de sakti ho, ya apni diary mein sirf apne abhi ke thoughts likh sakti ho bina kisi fear ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main paani pee kar aankhein band kar leti hoon. Padhne ka ya likhne ka toh abhi bilkul mood nahi hai meri.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking her through the execution of the chosen small step.
text: Pehle apne paas ek glass paani rakh lo, usme se do ghoont piyo aur apne bed par aaram se tik kar baith jao ya let jao... bas itna hi kafi hai abhi ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine paani pi liya. Thoda gala sookh raha tha. Par mujhe darr lag raha hai ki kal subah jab main uthungi, Papa phir se wahi taana marenge mujhe dekh kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the father's behavior as a systemic issue related to societal pressure.
text: Aksar parents society aur relatives ke pressure mein aakar itne ghabra jate hain ki wo apna darr bachhon par gusse ki tarah nikalte hain. Unki wo baatein darasal unki khud ki samajik anxiety hai, tumhari 'fitrat' ki kami nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unki samajik anxiety... ye ek alag perspective hai. Maine socha hi nahi ki wo society ke kya kahenge wale darr se bol rahe the mujhse aise.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her newfound understanding.
text: Toh ab tum unke uss taane ko, unke khud ke society se darr ke roop mein dekh pa rahi ho, jisme tumhara koi fail hona shaamil nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya
text: Haan, isse thoda burden kam lag raha hai. Par phir bhi mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai thoda thoda, main completely theek nahi hoon is waqt.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her emotional resilience and accepting her current state.
text: Ye burden apne aap kam karna itni badi baat hai. Ek hi raat mein completely theek hona zaroori nahi hai, tumhara is naye nazariye se khud ko un baaton se bachana bohot badi strength hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe ho. Ek ek karke hi cheezein hongi. Aaj kam se kam mujhe ek reason toh mil gaya apne aap ko blame na karne ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her empowered perspective shift.
text: Apne upar se wo saara blame hatana aur is reality ko accept karna, tumhare apne liye ek bohot supportive kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Thank you mere saath baithne ke liye. Main waqai bohot helpless aur sunn feel kar rahi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting one last small step for her immediate comfort tonight.
text: Ab jab wo sunn wali feeling thodi kam hui hai, toh sone se pehle khud ko aur sukoon dene ke liye ek chhoti si cheez kya sochi hai tumne?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main phone side mein rakh kar apni window se thodi der baahar dekhungi. Hawa thandi lagti hai wahan. Phir seedha so jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her self-soothing plan.
text: Window ke paas baith kar thandi hawa mein thoda time bitana sach mein ek bohot peaceful tarika hai aaj ki raat ko aaram se khatam karne ka.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi mein. Mujhe kal college jana hai toh thodi strength mujhe wahan se bhi mil jayegi doston ko dekh kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her readiness for tomorrow.
text: Kal apne doston ke beech ja kar, wapas ek student wali apni pehchan se judne ke liye tum andar se tayyar ho rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Main ab phone rakhti hoon. Good night.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing warmth.
text: Hum yahan hain jab bhi aisi koi akelahat ya darr wali feeling aaye. Aaram se hawa enjoy karo aur sukoon se so jao, take care.
